name: ChatGPT Images: New Generation
description: Open ChatGPT Images in the current tab, send a prompt that defaults to two variations unless already specified, and return the resolved chat id for follow-up polling.

browser_automation.description: Current-tab ChatGPT Images entry flow. It reuses the authenticated browser session, opens the Images surface, sends a prompt, and returns the chat handle for downstream polling.

sequences.name: chatgpt_images_new_generation
sequences.description: Open ChatGPT Images -> wait for composer -> send prompt -> return chat state.

required_variables.name: message_text
required_variables.description: Prompt text to send to ChatGPT Images

steps.name: Open ChatGPT Images in the current tab
Allow the Images SPA shell to settle
Wait for the ChatGPT Images composer or thread shell
steps.selector: #prompt-textarea, textarea[placeholder*='Describe' i], textarea[placeholder*='Message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Send a message' i], form textarea, [data-message-author-role], main article

steps.name: Send the image generation prompt and return the chat state
steps.script: const clean=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const message=clean(arg0);const parsedCount=Number.parseInt(clean(arg1),10);const variationCount=Number.isFinite(parsedCount)&&parsedCount>0?parsedCount:2;if(!message) throw new Error('message_text is required');const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const normalize=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const visible=(n)=>!!(n&&n instanceof Element&&getComputedStyle(n).visibility!=='hidden'&&getComputedStyle(n).display!=='none'&&n.getBoundingClientRect().width>0&&n.getBoundingClientRect().height>0);const chatId=()=>{const m=window.location.pathname.match(/^\/c\/([^/?#]+)/);return m?m[1]:null;};const composer=()=>Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#prompt-textarea, textarea[placeholder*='Describe' i], textarea[placeholder*='Message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Send a message' i], form textarea, div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true'], [contenteditable='true'][data-testid*='composer']")).find(visible)||null;const setText=(node,text)=>{node.focus();if(node instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement||node instanceof HTMLInputElement){const setter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(Object.getPrototypeOf(node),'value')?.set||Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype,'value')?.set||Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value')?.set;if(setter) setter.call(node,text);else node.value=text;node.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:text}));node.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return;}node.textContent=text;node.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:text}));};const sendBtn=(comp)=>{const form=comp?.closest('form');const scopes=[form,comp?.parentElement,comp?.closest('[role="group"]'),comp?.closest('main')].filter(Boolean);for(const scope of scopes){const candidates=Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll("button, [role='button']")).filter(visible);const preferred=candidates.find((node)=>{const label=normalize([node.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',node.getAttribute('title')||'',node.getAttribute('data-testid')||'',node.textContent||''].join(' ')).toLowerCase();const disabled=node.matches(':disabled')||node.getAttribute('aria-disabled')==='true';if(disabled) return false;if(/share|post\b|twitter|x\.com|copy link|export/.test(label)) return false;return /send prompt|send|submit|create image|create images|generate/.test(label);});if(preferred) return preferred;const submit=candidates.find((node)=>!node.matches(':disabled')&&node.getAttribute('type')==='submit');if(submit) return submit;}return null;};const finalPrompt=/\b(?:exactly|create)\s+\d+\s+(?:distinct\s+)?(?:image\s+)?variations?\b/i.test(normalize(message))?message:`${normalize(message)}\n\nGenerate exactly ${variationCount} distinct image variations. Return the final images in this chat.`;let comp=composer();if(!comp) throw new Error('ChatGPT Images composer not found');setText(comp,finalPrompt);await sleep(250);comp=composer()||comp;const btn=sendBtn(comp);if(!btn) throw new Error('ChatGPT Images send button not found');btn.click();const deadline=Date.now()+45000;while(Date.now()<deadline){if(chatId()) break;await sleep(750);}return {url:window.location.href,title:document.title,chat_id:chatId(),message_sent:message,submitted_prompt:finalPrompt,variation_count:variationCount};
